[]: Girlfriend of Steel 2 pics: Enjoy! XD             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 18, 2006 6:40 pm Please feel free to move into another theard if this is too off-topic for the chat theard... Anyway, so I played GoS2 (using Reichu's walkthrough. Alas, I enjoyed the crappy dating sim instead of wanting to stay clear from them! :shock: Then again, I *did* like GoS1 also, soo... *shrugs*) and ended up screen-capping some images (only 33 pics, no big whoop ;)) that I liked from it. There are several sites that you can find a crapload of more pics at, such as Aboslute Evangelion Field (why will that shut down soon?! I love that site! :cry: ) and Gainax pages. But can anyone translate what is being said here? It's from the Game Over Sequence (Not all of it) where Shinji got his nuts removed, lol. I'm assuming he wants sex as he talks really really fast about something (something about his "living room" and a "page" (from a book)??) and Asuka says "Stop it" as well as I think something about not being in the "mood", but I dunno. Whimpering in pain speaks for itself. And yes, Shinji and Asuka end up sleeping together in the game, after all. (As do Rei and Shinji, once they get hitched in the Shinji/Rei ending. With the Asuka/Shinji end, she leaves for Germany via boat (How else?) and Shinji gets dragged along with her. ; Anyways, please enjoy! []:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Dec 20, 2006 1:11 am All the other images make sense to me how they would fit in the game except this one. http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/GoS2/GoS2Asukasaabisu02.jpg what the hell? Asuka changing in the hanger? Daring Shinji to take her? What the hell?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Dec 20, 2006 10:50 am ... I'm debating if I was happier without that knowledge. I liked GoS 1... but... Meh, I already was disappointed with GoS 2 over being able to pursue Kaworu only so far...

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Wed Dec 20, 2006 3:46 pm http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/GoS2/GoS2Asukasaabisu02.jpg Humm... kinky Now I have to download it. BTW, isn't there any torrent in english? (Asking hopeless)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 20, 2006 8:41 pm If you mean the game is in English, then nope. Damn, I *KNOW* I've seen that 4 steps thing: 3)???? 4)Profit! somewhere, and I'm having a total brainfart. :? Simpsons? South Park? Family Guy? Some anime? *shikushikushiku...* Ummm....South Park? Underpants Gnomes? Bwahahaha, the translation makes it funnier. In terms of Youth (Japanese Culture thing), the only thing I really know is that youth=Summer(?), after your summer, you enter into a adulthood stage (ie: was a reference to this in Excel Saga: Farewell, My Summer...), or something. Ugh, I can't think right now, so yeah... Anyway, I felt playing this game acutally helped me a little with my Japanese, at least with praticing what I already know. For instance, I knew Shinji was saying something about Asuka's chest in that scene, I just didn't know what... Reichu, I liked your "translation" of the nigoki cage scene in your walkthrough: Reichu wrote: "Shinji! Mite mite! I'll pose, and you'll take a keepsake photo with Kensuke's camera! Careful, he WAS hiding it in his ass." After posing for you once, Asuka then goes on to give you even MORE service (apparently to make up for what she didn't provide earlier). I imagine the conversation went something like this: "Oh, Shinji... Is it hot in here or is it just you? Here, let me do something totally uncharacteristic and strip my plugsuit -- which, bizarrely, looks like a flimsy orange shirt when turned inside out -- right here in front of you while looking all girly and shy! Tee hee!" "What the **** are you doing, Asuka? I don't want to see such things! Oops, it seems I activated the camera by mistake."

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Dec 20, 2006 9:46 pm is the "gameplay" of this as non-interactive as GoS1? the original GoS was kind of awful not only because of practically not even being a game, but also because it felt like a shitty fanfic.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 20, 2006 9:57 pm Similar, but I think it's somewhat more improved. It seems like in this one you can explore more, though it does have the same options (Think/Speak/Move). Oh yeah, and I think I failed to mention this earlier, but it IS the seiyuu-sama from the series, despite what Leakapeida says. Hell, either the Gainax website itself or the Broccoli website has the VA's listed. You'd think however made up that article would figure that out, but no. :roll: And I dunno if you'd reading/have read the GoS2 manga (Angelic Days) but it has more or less the same plot...just improved in same ways. For instance, it seems like Fumino gives an explaniation SPOILER for why the hell Adam just disappears.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 20, 2006 10:37 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Oh yeah, and I think I failed to mention this earlier, but it IS the seiyuu-sama from the series, despite what Leakapeida says.
